fields.name: HSIKERON

enum_values.name: Forced
enum_values.description: HSI16 oscillator forced on even in Stop modes

enum_values.description: HSE is a crystal oscillator or ceramic resonator

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: HSE clock monitor enabled when HSE is ready, otherwise disabled
